name: subagent-event

defaults.event_policy: Emit an actor-message envelope-shaped JSON object for the coordinator; do not call transport tools directly.
defaults.output_format: JSON object with to, from, type, event, summary, body, metadata, confidence, and next_action.

template: pi -p --model {model} --thinking {thinking} {tools?--tools:--no-tools} {tools} Create an actor-message envelope-shaped event record. To: {to}. From: {from}. Type/event: {type}. Event policy: {event_policy}. Payload/body: {payload}. Output format: {output_format}
